process_layer_create_process_instance.postgresqlSql: INSERT INTO core.process_instances (process_instance_id, process_type, subject_ref, status, current_stage, current_owner, snapshot_json) VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s) RETURNING process_instance_id, process_type, subject_ref, status, current_stage, current_owner, snapshot_json, opened_at, closed_at, last_updated_at
process_layer_create_process_instance.sqlServerSql: INSERT INTO core.process_instances (process_instance_id, process_type, subject_ref, status, current_stage, current_owner, snapshot_json) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?);

process_layer_update_process_instance.postgresqlSql: UPDATE core.process_instances SET status = %s, current_stage = %s, current_owner = %s, snapshot_json = %s, closed_at = %s, last_updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE process_instance_id = %s
process_layer_update_process_instance.sqlServerSql: UPDATE core.process_instances SET status = ?, current_stage = ?, current_owner = ?, snapshot_json = ?, closed_at = ?, last_updated_at = SYSUTCDATETIME() WHERE process_instance_id = ?

process_layer_get_process_instance.postgresqlSql: SELECT process_instance_id, process_type, subject_ref, status, current_stage, current_owner, snapshot_json, opened_at, closed_at, last_updated_at FROM core.process_instances WHERE process_instance_id = %s LIMIT 1
process_layer_get_process_instance.sqlServerSql: SELECT TOP (1) process_instance_id, process_type, subject_ref, status, current_stage, current_owner, snapshot_json, opened_at, closed_at, last_updated_at FROM core.process_instances WHERE process_instance_id = ?
